item.title: Sunday School Teacher Did the Unthinkable
item.description: A trusted figure turned predator. How did a Sunday school teacher betray the innocence of a little girl, and what followed in the investigation?

media:content.media:title: Sunday School Teacher Did the Unthinkable
media:content.media:description: A trusted figure turned predator. How did a Sunday school teacher betray the innocence of a little girl, and what followed in the investigation?

item.title: A Husband Invited 72 Men to Assault His Wife | The Disturbing Case of Gisèle Pelicot
item.description: In one of the most disturbing cases ever, a husband orchestrated a horrific assault on his own wife. How did this shocking crime unfold, and what justice followed?

media:content.media:title: A Husband Invited 72 Men to Assault His Wife | The Disturbing Case of Gisèle Pelicot
media:content.media:description: In one of the most disturbing cases ever, a husband orchestrated a horrific assault on his own wife. How did this shocking crime unfold, and what justice followed?

item.title: I Hope She Gets the Justice She Deserves
item.description: Her story is heartbreaking, and the fight for accountability is far from over. Will justice finally be served, or will her case remain unresolved?

media:content.media:title: I Hope She Gets the Justice She Deserves
media:content.media:description: Her story is heartbreaking, and the fight for accountability is far from over. Will justice finally be served, or will her case remain unresolved?

item.title: What Happened to Eric Richins?
item.description: Eric Richins confided to his family that he feared his wife was trying to kill him. How did those chilling suspicions unfold, and what came next in this tragic story?

media:content.media:title: What Happened to Eric Richins?
media:content.media:description: Eric Richins confided to his family that he feared his wife was trying to kill him. How did those chilling suspicions unfold, and what came next in this tragic story?

item.title: Melissa Planned This… It Wasn’t an Accident
item.description: When tragedy struck, suspicions grew. Was Melissa’s involvement truly accidental—or was it carefully planned all along?

media:content.media:title: Melissa Planned This… It Wasn’t an Accident
media:content.media:description: When tragedy struck, suspicions grew. Was Melissa’s involvement truly accidental—or was it carefully planned all along?

item.title: She Ran Away and Was Found in a Shocking Way | The Disturbing Case of Emily Pike
item.description: Emily Pike’s disappearance ended in a shocking discovery. What happened after she ran away, and what disturbing details emerged?

item.title: She Turned Him Down — So He Took Her Life | SOLVED Catalina Gutiérrez Part 2
item.description: Catalina Gutiérrez’s rejection led to tragedy. How did detectives piece together the evidence to solve the case and deliver justice?

item.title: Her Killer Appeared on TV After the Crime | The Case of Luisa Fernanda Ovalle
item.description: Luisa Fernanda Ovalle’s murder shocked the nation—especially when her killer appeared on television afterward. How did investigators uncover the chilling truth?

item.title: The Case of 18‑Year‑Old Allison Bonilla
item.description: Allison Bonilla vanished while walking home, leaving her family desperate for answers. What really happened that night, and how was the truth uncovered?

media:content.media:description: Allison Bonilla vanished while walking home, leaving her family desperate for answers. What really happened that night, and how was the truth uncovered?

item.title: She Turned Him Down — So He Took Her Life | SOLVED Catalina Gutiérrez Part 1
item.description: Catalina Gutiérrez’s rejection led to a shocking act of violence. How did investigators solve the case and bring her killer to justice?
